data: Driving saw an object in the sky zoom within 50 ft in front of my car. It looked to be mechanical and traveling at high speed
Boomerang shaped, bigger than any plane in the sky and completely silent. Appeared to by gliding.
Appeared like a black flattened panel of a box (maybe 8-10 ft long from being 3-400 ft in the sky- silent- absolutely motionless
Large round glowing object that looked like small little objects flying out of it
I saw a grey pillar in the sky
I felt a sudden sleepiness when I stepped out side I sat down for 15 minutes
A triangle the size of a pyramid heading towards the mountains
Large craft hovering above trees beside the road
Seen solid Green or like object , no tail or flickering shoot across sky in 1 second. Like a blink and it was gone
I saw lights in the sky and a white silver diamond hovering then moving straight up at high speeds
Observed a bright yellow, non-flashing light in the night sky around 10:00 PM in Oakville, Ontario.
The object was blurry, silent, and moved at extreme high speed near jupiter.It appeared and disappeared within eye of blink
Slow moving orb that was red orange
A dot in the night sky, reddish color, fast, unnatural but very precise movement
Orb sighting which appeared and disappeared in different distances over the course of an hour.
Triangle formation lights,  it seemed like a massive craft
Huge vessels as big as a house, I am driving at 70 kmh and I see this object that stays in place for 1-2 minutes to my left, high
Was outside admiring stars, when the disk rose from the north and flew south.
Pulsating green light about 20 degrees above southern horizon.
Solid black line stretched from 12 o clock directly to 10:30 o clock (without crossing the middle) as if the moon were a clock.
Outside for a fresh air break and immediately there is a UAP in my line of sight…
Orange orb slightly moving, staying in same area. very bright sometimes
Large triangle (1 or 3 craft) traveling inhumanly fast at 40,000 ft with no evidence of propulsion
Pulsating red, green, orange, pink lights in the air that hovered for 4 hours and then just took off in a second.
Glowing orb that bounced up and down constantly
Unexplained craft in a storm cloud that had circulation
Looking at the Orion's Belt, when we noticed a very faint object moving from S to N then going back N to S. No navigation lights.
Green fireball being chased by helicopters
I saw what looked straight out of a sci-fi movie, a big aircraft moving very fast, it appeared for one second then disappeared the next
Half circle formation of lights shooting across the sky and disappearing
I spotted a bright white light in the sky at dusk with no other visible stars or planets visible at that time
Camera captured a bright flash; reflection on car hood shows a slowly rotating, unknown object or shape.
Three motherships moving toward the ocean slowly
Black triangle with four white pale backlit lights. There was an extra light between two of the corner lights
Very large firey orange orb was moving right above trees, close to the gravel yard property, seem to be searching for something.
I saw a small circular orb in the sky accelerating faster than a plane and then seemed to disappear.
The crafts would go in a straight line or in a zig zag. Some are amber, but some blend in with the stars.
Looking at western sky a giant dark object with 2 brighter white points on each end lit up the shadow of the craft/object
Just happened to look outside and wonder if its worth investigating what we seen in our sky here
3 red lights in triangle formation went north over Canandaigua NY.
Reappearing strange lights in sky at the same time every night for the last week.
Three lights in triangular shape that would move slowly up sky for about 20 minutes and then zoom north
Observing the sky and saw four bright objects in the sky. They all went into the same direction before fizzing out
Two high speed orbs at great distance, one higher than other. Parallel flight. Abrupt turn out of atmosphere.
We have been staying here for the past 2 months. We see at least one or 2 of these objects almost every night w/ flashing lights.
Large light, moving extremely fast, changed direction abnormally, absolutely no sound, and just disappeared
Driving on i70 heading north blue light/orb flying down from sky. Second sighting green craft 200 yards away flew to my left i70
It was discovered that there were glowing moving objects, like tic-tac.
A sphere passed over my head with no propellers or signs of propulsion.
Multiple linear objects in formation. Silent.
Two white lights, kept equal distance between each other and moved together in perfect synchronisation. No other visible lights.
Blue and yellow Lights in sky in perfect formation
I was out to check the mail and the dog started flipping out. I looked up and saw the object changing shape.
4 lights in a diamond formation flashed brightly then split up.
Two black Doritos shape low flying anti gravity silent flying in perfect formation side by side wing to wing with no lights
Pulsing orb in the eastern sky with the sun behind it
Round circular bright with small white lights flashing one at a time in a counterclockwise rotation
Facing roughly west toward Santa Monica / Pacific Ocean. The object appeared near the direction of the setting sun.
Silver short cigar shaped flying at incredibly high speed
Two objects moving NE silently and unblinking in sky
Taking a walk around the neighborhood and saw craft heading to North
Saw large orb following smaller orb. Captured two minutes of footage. Couldn't see anything on flight radar or starlink
A spinning light in the sky, in one place for a time, before completely disappearing
Silent illuminated craft seen disappearing behind building at low altitude, not seen re-emerging.
Triangular object in which the lights were blue and red but it moved at a strange speed and in turns out of the ordinary
Hovering shapeshifting object with a strange light aura around it. This time it had a large orange orb with it.
The object could not be identified and does not match conventional aircraft, drones, satellites, or natural phenomena.
Saw sphere move across the sky at approximately 1000 ft alt. Traveling west.
Black triangle. Darker than the night sky. 1 red light on a corner, a white light on each of the other 2 corners.
A triangle shaped UFO was doing circles in the sky
7-8 objects quickly flew into view, 2-3 flew off SW direction and the rest flew S-SE direction.
Orbs in the sky disappearing and reappearing, change of speed, direction and brightness
I woke up in a lab testing room surrounded by humanoid figures doing experiments on other people in the room.  Passed out shortly after
Red-flashing on/off 1/2 second every 1 second. Vertical ascending and descending. Erratic flight then straight line towards me.
The orange bright light kept appearing and disappearing for 3 minutes.
Vilnius 22:40. 3 silent discs, pea-size. Speed >12k km/h. Last one made smooth arc turn South. Obscured stars. No sound. No trails.UAP
I saw three different things, would not call them craft
Small object travelling slowly across the sky but multiple objects seen.
Stood out on my deck and saw this object hovering above my town. Sparkling and hard to track, but obviously not a commercial aircraft
It was dark. Triangles made up of lights. There were two. Couldn't tell if they were attached or just side by side
Me and my 4 other friends saw lasers/beams in the sky
3 to 4 red lights in a line mostly perpendicular to the ground with the bottom light leading slightly & the top light trailing slightly
Huge black square hovering over highway, almost invisible
What first appears to be satelites turned out to be a massive fleet of satelite looking objects changing directions
Blue/red lights, black triangle no sound darts with a light trail behind, moves up, down, horizontal etc
I was star gazing over Mt. Shasta. I noticed two lights flying in unison across the sky. I began recording.
Saw 8-9 small star-like orbs moving in a cluster south toward the ocean
Line of three evenly spaced lights moving very slowly from the NNW horizon.
Witnessed two waves of lights ascend into the sky together then separate in different directions, hover, speed up, disappear & reappear
Seen a Grey Alien at Borax Lake in Clearlake, CA
My entire Anthropology class witnessed it outside while we were reporting on social hierarchy in the dining hall
Cane Corso alarmed by dark shadow in enclosed bush corridor. Bright flash. No exit route. Entity vanished.
3 white orbs, high G turns, full stop mid air, no trail, no noise, speed exceeded Mach1 at the end of the encounter
Hovering craft, then shot into space at end
My brother heard something in the sky and looked ww both saw a very bright orb going insanly fast just zipped from north to south
White circle with green lights in triangle form front and back but no sound, pass over it eventually started to dim
Object following aircraft frame from Gatwick heading towards France
We noticed a white light moving across the sky, lit up bright as the sun for about 3 seconds before it dimmed back down
Steady light moving in a strange manner, it'd go forward then pause a second and back up before moving forward again & zigzagging too.
We watched 2 red lights going straight north with no sound at a low altitude.
Glowing red white and blue lights almost like a huge spot light about 80 feet high and about 140 feet wide, silent.
A faint, gray colored boomerang-shaped object appeared in our line of vision. It was close enough to identify the object.
Bright light in sky changed shapes, color. I had no telescope and used binoculars.
Unknown object I observed for about 30 minutes that changed shape, color, and direction multiple times
Unusually bright light, much brighter than a plane.
Saw a beach ball sized orb was illuminated but not in a bright kind of way. I traveling west and it going east at high rate of speed.
3 white circles w black trianglee on sides- moving fast across sky in triangle formation - above jets passing in sky
My roommate and I were driving and saw a strange light hovering and then took off
Lights way up in the clouds beaming in a circular motion one at a time but cylindrically
I looked west and seen a orange orb about 1,000 feet up go down behind some trees.
Spotted multiple points of light moving in various direction often stopping and starting at various altitudes fairly far away
Yellow lights moving oddly at low elevations before changing shape.
While driving, we both saw a triangle with bright white lights at the end of three points with a pulsating red light in the middle
Flashlight white light then it started flashing red and white
One large unlit dark plane, followed closely by 4 other smaller craft in a V-formation.
Swarm of thin sheets only visible with polarized sunglasses
I saw 4 blinking green lights, in a square pattern, travel about 2 miles in 10 seconds with no sound.
Bright white light. Smaller red light on left and blue light on right. Flew over city and AFB. No sound detected.
BRIGHT saucer shape hovering in sky. Zero stars, towers, or cities for 30 miles. Military searching overhead the next day!
UFO circled overhead, grew larger, vanished instantly; I felt dizzy, heard voices, and saw strange beings.
Blinking green light, very high in the sky. Made impossible moves for any known aircraft.
Triangle white green and red lights. Rotating and spinning around center axis. Moving randomly in 3 dimensions short distances
Glowing stationary orb at bottom of cloud layer for approx 15 minutes duration above West Maui
Walking north, flash of light streaking downward, toward north horizon
Me and my friend were in my hot tub and abruptly he says to turn around and i see the tail end of a flying disc.
Came home from work caught this on my iphone
Yellowish light over North Dothan. Move slowly East and Southeast.
Abnormal lights, abnormal shape, flying low and slow
It was over a remote area near close to winters and followed me
Tons of white orbs defying physics visible by looking at the sun and blocking out the sun with a hand
Weird egg shaped light on camera
Very bright green flash in sky and then a massive but very quiet rotating disk with a very large green aura surrounding it, very fast
White orb in daylight that disappeared
3 objects seen successively disappeared and reappeared at 5min intervals 3 times the second time there were 4 objects
White sphere at a high altitude.
Bright hovering fireball and unknown objects
Three lights in a triangle shape
Reminiscent of the phoenix lights but smaller in size.
Small flashing object in night sky, silent, moving at least Mach 1.5
Very far away, purple thrust rings that correspond with speed of craft, physical emotional distress from me and partner
2 bright orbs moving fast and steady in many directions
It had 2 lights and was still in the sky and circle shaped, and I saw it, and it flew away so fast and disappeared
Flying over our apartment, crossing over the bridge the thing started to roll over and than continue is route. No noise.
Bright white light in small round sphere flashing at me in sky to the northeast.
Mostly gray but had like flashing red blue and yellow lights, it started going at a super fast pace across the sky.
Low flying yellow orb in the east sky headed south east slowly video the object along with the commercial aircraft in the sky.
Tiny pulsing blue light high in sky well above airplanes moving erraticly.
Fast moving unvarying bright white light.
Color-changing orb hovering for about 15 minutes and then disappears
3 orange ball shaped objects moving through the sky.
Large bright changing stationary light for long duration. Disappeared after filming started.
I saw a strange cloud that looked like a mustache. At 2nd glanceI knew it wasn't natural right away as the craft vanished from middle
I am interested if anyone reported seeing the same sighting.
Two lights travelling very high along the same path/trajectory
Visible and suddenly and distinctly sharp linear movement with light fading almost instantly
Very quick. Looked up and saw a brilliant white light about the size of a pea, just above treetops traveling NW. No sound.
Walked out in front porch and it was just sitting there. Watch for 30 minutes before I had to get ready when I came back it was gone
Hovering Lighted sphere (photographed) stationary or moving slowly for up to 30 seconds, then accelerated horizontally out of sight.
Object was directly above my location
Multi-colored UAP (green/red/blue) with web-like structure in telescope, over Pacific Ocean, Santa Marianita, Ecuador – 1 hour duration
The object was a cross between a disk and sphere. It visited me several nights in a row. It many different light settings. I saw 5.
White orb traveled straight line. Suddenly turned at 45 degrees, fast travel, vanished.
We saw it while driving back to TX on I-10
In the semi-darkness of the sidewalk in front of my home, a dark 'blob' separated into human figures, walked toward me.
I saw 5-6 feet under the ufo I saw plasma liquid type material that the craft was using it looked like blueish with diamond rocking in
It scared me and it passed over my house at a slow speed. when I got my phone out it dissappeared. I was shocked.
2 orbs moving at approximately 80 to 90 mph, 500 to 600 ft. in the air.
I have never seen anything like it it was just a sheet of light so crazy
I witnessed an amber light coming through the cloud layers and came to a stop
Very bright orb shaped craft, travelling east, flying relativley low , wasnt high up in the sky. See video
During the War In UAE with Iran
Triangular craft, had lights, moved in ways that drones can't, was spotted close to the ground (60ft), moved strangely and erratically
Multiple orbs appeared low over the horizon over the the sea, some appear to move some not. Very bright.
Object was approximately 5 feet tall and in a vertical position with tentacles extending in all directions like a tree branch.
I was standing on the overpass when I took two photographs 9 seconds apart using a full-spectrum modified camera.
Approx 12:47pm a chrome oval-shaped craft flew inland beneath our commercial airliner. Had no discernible windows or propulsion.
